default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outset and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and article production.](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two collaboration articles ready for review; Lawson to provide feedback via Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Content length target: 1500-2000 words, flexible based on topic and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Visual elements: Currently using stock photos; exploring AI-generated options that align with brand](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Strategy: Publish initial content, then enrich high-performing or high-conviction pieces](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Mariana generated two collaboration articles for Lawson's review](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Initial phase requires joint approval to ensure right voice and proper sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Lawson to leave comments in Google Docs for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Key areas for input: preferred sources, competitors to avoid mentioning, tone adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Content Length and SEO Strategy

  - [Target range: 1500-2000 words, with flexibility (500-3000 words)](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [No hard rules; focus on user experience and comprehensive topic coverage](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [SEO approach: Consider average length of top-ranking content for important keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Shorter, to-the-point content can still rank well if valuable to users](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### Visual Elements and Branding

  - [Various client preferences: AI-generated, stock images, or brand-specific elements](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Current limitation: GrowthX not equipped for fully custom design at scale](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Proposed solution: Use existing Outset program images as article headers](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Future consideration: AI-generated black and white comic-style images (Lawson's idea)](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Content Enrichment Strategy

  - [Start with "70% perfect" articles to test traction](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Enrich high-performing or high-conviction pieces post-publication](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Potential enhancements: additional imagery, charts, design elements](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [AI-generated charts improving but still have limitations](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Identify set of priority keywords for performance](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [For highly competitive keywords, continually improve and update articles](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Add extra elements (e.g., charts, visuals) to boost performance on crucial topics](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lawson to review and comment on two collaboration articles in Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Team to finalize visual strategy, likely using existing Outset program images](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Mariana to adjust content based on Lawson's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Publish initial articles and monitor performance](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Develop plan for ongoing content enrichment and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/_gymaQ1J9LGF8siRstmDNmRpEgyta1vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

action_items.description: Provide list of preferred sources for articles to reference
Provide list of competitors not to mention in articles
Review 2 collab articles in Google Docs. Leave comments on content, tone, style. Ensure conversational enough. Check sources/competitors mentioned.
Send Lawson links to 2 collab articles in Content OS for review
Send Lawson link to Content OS platform
